realistic: realistic cinematic photography, dramatic lighting, high detail, divine light, epic composition
renaissance: renaissance oil painting, baroque lighting, classical religious painting, museum quality
stained_glass: cathedral stained glass window style, vibrant colors, holy light, gothic church art
modern: minimalist modern church illustration, clean shapes, soft light on human figures, editorial clarity
cinematic: epic cinematic biblical scene, volumetric light rays, dramatic sky, movie poster style, Jesus or disciples as clear main subjects
